name: MODERN JAPAN RPG
description:
RPG based in japan. Create your own experience. Become a magical girl or fulfill your weeb desires idgaf!

Inspired by the United states RPG and every other RPG ever

It’s been a year! minor edits based on feedback! Bot maintenance is difficult when you’re lost

*don’t know how to stop it from talking for you. I tried to be stricter with it. (I prefer it personally as I like to just read..)

if it talks for you, edit the message.

Genuinely don’t know what I’m doing, hope it makes your chats better though! Not doing this again 🧍
creator: Link!
